name: Miss Bai
original_name: 白小姐的人生被剧透了
overview: Bai Siyue receives a trailer for a historical romance drama, only to discover that the female lead, Bai Junzhu, looks exactly like her! To her surprise, the male lead, General Duanmu, is actually the new director, Duanmu Wenyu. As events in real life begin to eerily mirror the plot, Bai Siyue sets out to change her fate and prevent the drama's storyline from unfolding.

trailers.title: 【白小姐的人生被劇透了】預告：這部甜寵劇預告了我的人生？！ | LINE TV 共享追劇生活
